name: Apricot Mist Punch
recipeIngredient: 3 cans (6 oz each) frozen limeade concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apricot nectar, pineapple juice, and frozen limeade concentrate in a punch bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the ginger ale to the mixture.
4. Decorate with a rim of ice and lime slices.
